site.name: Build A Ring Farm Guide
site.description: Build A Ring Farm wiki and guide for Roblox players, covering codes status, seeds, crops, gear shop, sprays, mutations, fertilizer, offline income, farm layout, tier list, advanced crops, weather events, upgrades, money farming, official update checks, safe gameplay tips, and source-checked game information.

game.name: Build A Ring Farm
game.descriptionSummary: Build A Ring Farm is a Roblox farming simulator where players grow and harvest plants, upgrade the farm, expand production, sell crops for cash, and keep earning while offline.
game.codeSystemSignal: No official or in-game code system has been verified yet.

codes.verificationPolicy: Do not publish active codes without official or in-game proof.
codes.thirdPartyConflictSummary: No third-party code claims have been accepted as verified.

redeemGuide.note: Add redemption steps only after checking the real in-game UI.

verificationChecklist: Check the official Roblox game page.
Check developer-linked official channels only after source verification.
Run an in-game redemption test before promoting any code to active.
Record source, date, and result for every code change.
codes.screenshotPlaceholder: No screenshot proof has been added.
codes.whyOtherSitesShowCodes: Other sites may publish unverified strings. This site keeps unverified claims separate from verified active codes.

pages.title: Build A Ring Farm Wiki & Guide | Codes, Crops, Upgrades

faq.q: What is Build A Ring Farm Wiki?
faq.a: Build A Ring Farm Wiki is an independent fan guide for the Roblox farming simulator Build A Ring Farm.

faq.q: Is this an official Build A Ring Farm website?
faq.a: No. This is an independent fan guide. The official game page is on Roblox.
